title: Create Client Registration Page with UI-Only Form

requirements.text: Create new route /client-register in frontend/src/App.tsx and corresponding page component at frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx

quotes: BUILD CLIENT REGISTER PAGE — UI ONLY

acceptanceCriteria: Route /client-register is registered in App.tsx router configuration
ClientRegister.tsx component file exists at frontend/src/pages/ClientRegister.tsx
Page is accessible via navigation to /client-register

requirements.text: Update Header.tsx to route the 'Daftar' navigation link to /client-register instead of its current target
acceptanceCriteria: Daftar link in Header.tsx navigates to /client-register
Navigation works correctly on both desktop and mobile views
Link maintains existing styling and behavior

requirements.text: Implement centered card layout in ClientRegister.tsx with white background, soft shadow, rounded corners, max-width 600-700px, and comfortable padding

quotes: Card style: white background, shadow, rounded corners

acceptanceCriteria: Card is horizontally centered on the page
Card has white background with soft drop shadow
Card has rounded corners matching site design system
Card max-width is between 600-700px
Card has comfortable internal padding

requirements.text: Add card title 'Form Pendaftaran Client' at the top of the ClientRegister card
acceptanceCriteria: Title displays exactly as 'Form Pendaftaran Client'
Title uses appropriate heading typography
Title is positioned at the top of the card

requirements.text: Create four form input fields in ClientRegister.tsx: Nama (required), Email (required), WhatsApp (required), and Company (optional). All inputs must be disabled by default with soft borders, comfortable padding, and placeholder text

quotes: Semua input disabled default → aktif hanya setelah dummy Login II
Inputs: border soft, padding nyaman, placeholder text

acceptanceCriteria: Four input fields are rendered: Nama, Email, WhatsApp, Company
All inputs have disabled attribute set to true by default
All inputs have soft borders and comfortable padding
All inputs display appropriate placeholder text
Company field is visually indicated as optional

requirements.text: Add Submit button below the form fields with primary black styling, pill-radius, and disabled state by default (50% opacity when disabled)

quotes: Button: Submit = primary black, pill-radius, disabled state opacity 50%

acceptanceCriteria: Submit button is rendered below form fields
Button text is exactly 'Submit'
Button has primary black background color
Button has pill-radius (fully rounded corners)
Button is disabled by default
Disabled state shows 50% opacity

requirements.text: Add Login Internet Identity button below the Submit button with secondary styling and full width. Button label must be exactly 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'

quotes: **Login II button** terpisah **di bawah tombol Submit**
Button: Login II = secondary style, full width

acceptanceCriteria: Login II button is positioned below Submit button with appropriate spacing
Button text is exactly 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'
Button has secondary styling (not primary black)
Button spans full width of the card
Button is enabled by default (not disabled)

requirements.text: Implement dummy UI state toggle in ClientRegister.tsx: clicking Login II button toggles a local state that enables/disables the Submit button and all input fields. No authentication logic, API calls, or backend integration

quotes: Klik → dummy UI aktifkan tombol Submit
Tombol Login II hanya toggle UI state, tidak ada backend
Semua input disabled default → aktif hanya setelah dummy Login II

acceptanceCriteria: Local React state tracks login status (default: false)
Clicking Login II button toggles login status
When logged in, all input fields become enabled
When logged in, Submit button becomes enabled
When logged out, all inputs and Submit button are disabled
No API calls or authentication logic is executed
No backend integration or real authentication

requirements.text: Apply responsive mobile-first layout to ClientRegister.tsx: ensure card is centered, maintains comfortable padding on mobile screens, and adapts width appropriately across screen sizes
acceptanceCriteria: Layout works correctly on mobile screens (320px+)
Card maintains comfortable padding on all screen sizes
Card is horizontally centered on desktop and tablet
All form elements stack vertically with appropriate spacing
No horizontal scrolling on mobile devices
Touch targets meet minimum size requirements on mobile

requirements.text: Ensure all text content in ClientRegister.tsx matches specification exactly: 'Form Pendaftaran Client', 'Nama', 'Email', 'WhatsApp', 'Company', 'Submit', 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'

quotes: Semua teks persis seperti di spec, jangan ubah

acceptanceCriteria: Card title is exactly 'Form Pendaftaran Client'
Input labels match exactly: 'Nama', 'Email', 'WhatsApp', 'Company'
Submit button text is exactly 'Submit'
Login II button text is exactly 'Login Internet Identity (Login II)'
No text modifications or translations

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not implement real authentication or backend integration
Do not create any backend logic or API endpoints
All interactions must be UI-only dummy state management
Maintain consistency with existing InternalPortal.tsx and PartnerPortal.tsx styling patterns
